alternateCalendars.label: Early/Middle College and Academies Academic Calendar 2025-2026

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Guilford County Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Guilford County Schools is Monday, August 25, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Guilford County Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Guilford County Schools is Wednesday, June 10, 2026. The school year runs from August through June, covering 185 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Guilford County Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Guilford County Schools runs March 30–April 3, 2026 — a full week off. Wake County breaks the week before (March 23–27) and Charlotte-Mecklenburg breaks the week after (April 6–10), so there is no common break window with either major neighboring district.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Guilford County Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Guilford County Schools runs December 22, 2025–January 1, 2026, a total of 11 days. School resumes January 2, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2025-2026 for Guilford County Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Guilford County Schools runs November 26–28, 2025 (Wednesday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 27. School resumes Monday, December 1, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Offset from Neighbors
yearNumbers.detail: GCS Spring Break runs March 30–April 3, 2026. Wake County breaks March 23–27 (one week earlier) and Charlotte-Mecklenburg breaks April 6–10 (one week later) — GCS families have no common break window with either major neighboring district.

yearNumbers.label: 11-Day Winter Break
yearNumbers.detail: Winter Break runs December 22–January 1 — 11 days off. School resumes January 2, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: 185 Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: Guilford County requires 185 instructional days — 5 more than the North Carolina state minimum of 180, adding a full extra week of school compared to minimum-compliance districts.

calendarNotes: Guilford County Schools begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 25, 2025. Spring Break runs March 30–April 3, 2026. Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools breaks April 6–10 — one week after GCS — so families coordinating between the two districts have no common break window this year. The school year ends June 10, 2026.
